title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
